FFGOMEZ DENTAL

Precision and artistry, in every treatment.

Curated treatments for your radiant smile — comfort and craftsmanship in every visit.

CURATED TREATMENTS

For your radiant smile.

At FFGOMEZ DENTAL, meticulous craftsmanship meets modern technique. Every treatment below is delivered with the calm precision of a studio — tailored to your goals, your comfort, and the long-term health of your smile.

Oral Prophylaxis

Professional cleaning and polishing that clears plaque, tartar, and surface stains before they become bigger problems. Using gentle hand and ultrasonic instruments, we reach the areas daily brushing misses, leaving your teeth smooth, refreshed, and easier to keep clean between visits.

Light-Cure Fillings

Tooth-colored composite fillings that are precisely shaped and bonded to match your natural enamel, then hardened instantly with a curing light. The result restores strength to the tooth without the dark, conspicuous look of older filling materials.

Teeth Whitening

A controlled, in-studio brightening treatment that lifts years of staining from coffee, tea, and everyday wear. We monitor shade and sensitivity throughout, so you leave with a noticeably whiter smile without compromising enamel health.

Dentures

Full or partial dentures custom-fitted to your bite and facial structure. Every set is built for comfort and a natural appearance first, so eating, speaking, and smiling feel secure again — not just replaced, but restored.

Root Canal Treatment

Gentle, precise care that removes infected or damaged pulp from inside the tooth, relieving pain and stopping the spread of infection. Our approach prioritizes saving your natural tooth whenever possible, preserving both function and appearance.

Braces (Aligners)

Traditional braces and clear aligner options that gradually guide your teeth into a straighter, more confident smile. We track progress closely at every adjustment, balancing steady movement with everyday comfort.

Tooth Extraction

Safe, comfortable removal of teeth that are too damaged, decayed, or crowded to save. We walk you through the process beforehand and provide clear aftercare guidance, so healing is smooth and worry-free.

Fixed Bridge

A durable, natural-looking solution for replacing one or more missing teeth. Anchored to the surrounding teeth, a fixed bridge restores your bite, chewing function, and smile line without the need for removable appliances.

Jacket Crown

Custom-made full-coverage crowns that strengthen a damaged or weakened tooth while matching the exact shade and shape of your natural teeth, protecting it from further wear without drawing attention to itself.

Veneers

Thin, custom-crafted shells bonded to the front of your teeth to refine shape, color, size, and alignment in a single treatment. Veneers are shade-matched by hand for a result that looks entirely your own, only more even and radiant.

QUESTIONS

Frequently Asked Questions

Pricing depends on the specifics of your case, so we don't publish a fixed list. Message us through the chat icon or call 0925-8-DENTAL (336825) and our team will walk you through costs for the treatment you're considering.
From routine cleanings and fillings to cosmetic work like veneers and whitening, and restorative treatments like crowns, bridges, dentures, and root canals — the ten services above cover our core offerings. If you don't see what you need, ask us directly.
Your first visit starts with a conversation about your goals and history, followed by an exam and any needed X-rays. We'll walk you through findings and options before any treatment begins — no surprises, no pressure.
It depends on what you're starting with. Some patients just need a professional cleaning and whitening; others benefit from veneers, aligners, or a combination of treatments. Book a consultation and we'll recommend a plan suited to your smile and budget.
We recommend a checkup and cleaning every six months for most patients. If you have ongoing treatment, gum concerns, or a higher risk of decay, we may suggest a shorter interval tailored to you.

Your journey to a healthier, more confident smile starts here.
